headline: Palantir’s USDA Deal And Defense Manifesto Reframe Its Government Role
summary: Palantir Technologies (NasdaqGS:PLTR) has secured a $300 million agreement with the U.S. Department of Agriculture to modernize farm program operations and support national farm security. The USDA deal extends Palantir's software into agricultural policy and supply chain management, expanding its role in U.S. public infrastructure. Alongside the contract, Palantir released a 22 point manifesto based on a book co authored by CEO Alex Karp, outlining its views on defense, AI weapons, and...

headline: Palantir and AIP Specialist Firm, Vanyar, Launches
summary: Vanyar launches today as a specialist firm focussed on Palantir Foundry and AIP. Its launch comes at a critical time in the market when enterprise AI transformation programmes are becoming slower, more complex and increasingly difficult to deliver. These initiatives, which often involve platforms like Palantir, continue to fall short for many companies wanting to get ahead.
